message:
test(serve): batch 14 — CASS full paths, bead CRUD, memory daemon start (73.7%→74.4%)

Key per-function improvements:
- handleMemoryDaemonStart: 33.3% → 100% (cm installed, no daemon, bad JSON)
- handleCreateBead: 68.6% → 80% (br installed, valid title, type/priority/labels)
- handleCloseBead: 62.5% → 75% (br installed error path)
- handleUpdateBead: 67.7% → 74.2% (valid JSON, update args)
- handleGetBead: 60% → 73.3% (bead not found via RunBd)
- handleMemoryOutcome: valid status parsing + invalid status + bad JSON
- handleCASSCapabilities/Insights/Timeline: full installed paths
- handleBeadsRecipes: bv installed path
- bead CRUD: get/update/close/deps/remove in temp dir

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
